notes: First time launching the game during the first time setup it gives a warning "no audio device detected", but works perfectly anyway out of the box. The performance does not scale much with quality settings, but with everything maxed including 8xAA I got around 50fps at 2560x1600 resolution without any stuttering.
title: I Am Alive

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box. But with some fps drops, if you want a solid fps add PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% to steam launch parameters, now it works at 60fps for me.
title: I Am Alive
